potential_missing.source_sentence: The customer goes to the shop and purchases the medicine required.
The Online Pharmacy is easy to use and order.
the customer needs to create a login account and fill all the details like name, address, any id no, etc.
The business goal for the application is to provide the medicines to all the people and admin will provide the supplier details .

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: So a lot of time is wasted and the person gets tired.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall minimize the time spent by customers on purchasing medicines.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: If he wants to exchange the product, once again he goes to the shop and replaces them.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow customers to easily exchange products without visiting the physical store.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall enable customers to view the status of medicines.
hallucinations.reason: This requirement is not supported by any evidence in the source text. The original text only mentions that the customer can 'view the status of the medicines', but it does not imply that this feature is a new addition.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall allow customers to select required medicines with a single click.
duplicates.requirement_b: The Online Pharmacy is easy to use and order. The customer selects the required medicines and orders them with a single click.
duplicates.reason: These two requirements are essentially the same, but the rewritten requirement uses more formal language.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall require customers to create a login account prior to placing an order.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is ambiguous because it does not specify what information needs to be provided during the registration process (e.g. name, address, id no).
